title: Blackbeard's Ghost
writer: Bill Walsh, Don DaGradi, Ben Stahl
actors: Peter Ustinov, Dean Jones, Suzanne Pleshette
plot: Track coach Steve Walker accidentally invokes the spirit of notorious pirate Captain Blackbeard who was believed dead. He must now lay the pirate to rest and save a local hotel from mobster Silky Seymour, who wants to build a casino.
